sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48098" key="qema/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεμᾰ´τ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <sense id="n48098.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θέμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg004:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antig.Nic.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
